messages.content: Hi there! How can I help you?
How do i remove a substring from a string in python_

You can use the str.replace() method to replace a substring in a string:

str = "This is a string with a substring that I want to remove"
removed_str = str.replace(substring, "")

This will return a new string with the substring removed.
